<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on purple part of lower block
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

print("Changed nodes:")
before_map = {n['boundary']: n for n in before}
for n in after:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b in before_map:
        bn = before_map[b]
        if bn['color'] != n['color'] or bn['pixels'] != n['pixels'] or bn['hash'] != n['hash']:
            print(f"  id={n['id']} boundary={b} color:{bn['color']}->{n['color']} pixels:{bn['pixels']}->{n['pixels']}")
    else:
        print(f"  NEW id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={b}")

# Also check for removed nodes
after_map = {n['boundary']: n for n in after}
for n in before:
    b = n['boundary']
    if b not in after_map:
        print(f"  REMOVED id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={b}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare by id and color instead
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

before_by_id = {n['id']: n for n in before}
after_by_id = {n['id']: n for n in after}

all_ids = set(list(before_by_id.keys()) + list(after_by_id.keys()))
for iid in sorted(all_ids):
    bn = before_by_id.get(iid)
    an = after_by_id.get(iid)
    if bn and not an:
        print(f"  REMOVED id={iid} color={bn['color']} pixels={bn['pixels']}")
    elif an and not bn:
        print(f"  NEW id={iid} color={an['color']} pixels={an['pixels']}")
    elif bn and an:
        if bn['color'] != an['color'] or bn['pixels'] != an['pixels']:
            print(f"  CHANGED id={iid} color:{bn['color']}->{an['color']} pixels:{bn['pixels']}->{an['pixels']}")

# Show the relevant region
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(33, 45):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][25:40]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
